__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Miss Universe Crown,Mother and Daughter,Taketori Tale,Cintamani
|rank=purple
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 30 Divine Chaos Chests opened: Snail DEF +8; Divine Chaos Chests Opened: 1500/1500
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Divine Chaos Chests]]
